meta.title: Infobackground — Websites and landing pages that sell
meta.desc: We build landing pages and websites for businesses and solo entrepreneurs. Fast — from 7 days, high quality — custom design, affordable — a fixed quote before we start.

hero.title: We build websites <drama>that sell.</drama>
hero.sub: Landing pages and websites for businesses and solo entrepreneurs: fast, high-quality and without astronomical budgets. From the first call to launch — 7–14 days.

approach.small: They say: “fast, good, cheap — pick two.”
approach.big: We built our process so you <drama>don’t have to pick.</drama>
approach.lead: We don’t sell “digital transformation” or 60-slide decks. We design every website for one goal: turning traffic into leads. Structure, copy, design and launch — one team, no months of approvals.

p1.d: A one-pager takes 5–7 days, a landing page 7–14. Every stage has a date and an owner. If a deadline shifts, we tell you first — no chasing needed.

p2.d: Custom design, not an “everyone has it” template. Structure and prototype are approved before design, so there are no last-minute rebuilds.

p3.d: A transparent quote before we start: fixed price, no “we’ll clarify in a meeting”. 30 days of free fixes after launch.

services.title: Formats that cover 90% of needs
services.lead: Each with a fixed timeline, a clear price and post-launch support. No “we’ll clarify in a meeting”.

s1.d: A clean one-page site about a company, specialist or product. Enough to be found and contacted.

s2.d: A modern landing page ready for paid traffic: selling structure, custom design and a lead form integrated with your CRM.
s2.li1: Structure and prototype approved before design
s2.li2: Custom design (not an “everyone has it” template)
s2.li4: Analytics, forms and automations wired in

s3.d: A full company website: services, case studies, blog. Design system, fast loading and an SEO foundation.
s3.li1: Up to 10 pages: services, cases, about
s3.li2: A single design system for your brand
s3.li3: SEO basics: speed, markup, meta tags
s3.li4: CMS — edit content yourself, no developer

s4.d: We refresh the visuals and structure of a site that stopped bringing in leads. We keep what already works and remove what's holding back conversion.
s4.li1: Audit of the current site and its lead-loss points
s4.li2: A new design on top of the existing structure

process.title: How a website is born
process.lead: Four steps from request to launch. You see the result at each one — no “we’re working on it, please wait”.

st1.d: A 20-minute call or a Telegram chat. We lock the website’s goal, timeline and quote — before work starts.

st2.d: Selling structure and copy for every screen — before design. Approved upfront so nothing gets rebuilt later.

st3.d: Custom design, animations, mobile-ready. We show progress every 2–3 days.

st4.d: Domain, analytics, forms, CRM integrations. Then 30 days of free fixes after launch.

why.title: Numbers you can rely on
why.lead: No “in business since 2008”. Real results from recent years — the thing that actually shows the level.

n1.d: launched for businesses and independent professionals

n2.d: from brief to a working one-pager

n3.d: with a market average of 1.5–3% on paid traffic

n4.d: after launch we fix anything that misbehaves

f.title: Aleksandr Matochkin
f.quote: “Every project is treated like a website for <accent>our best friend.”</accent>
f.text: I’ve been building websites and automations for businesses for 4 years. I run every project personally — from the first call to launch. Most clients come through referrals, so cutting corners simply doesn’t pay.
f.name: Aleksandr Matochkin
f.role: founder · 4 years in AI and web

t.title: What our clients say after launch
t.lead: No “reviews under NDA, trust us”. Real words from real clients after launch.

t0.q: “I want to say a huge thank you for building and designing the website! The brief wasn't simple — to convey a feeling of care, aesthetics and top-level service through a screen. The result <accent>exceeded every expectation</accent>: the site turned out stylish, modern and genuinely easy to use. The design decisions, typography, responsiveness — all done at the highest level. I'm already hearing a lot of warm feedback about the site from clients.”
t0.name: Svetlana

t1.q: “We ordered a landing page for a new product line. Delivered faster than promised, and above all — it actually works. Conversion to lead is <accent>6.2%</accent> — the previous site had 1.8%. Paid traffic finally pays off.”
t1.name: Mikhail Drozdov

t2.q: “We needed a website for an online school. The team proposed a structure we hadn’t even imagined and launched in <accent>12 days</accent>. A month later our cost per lead dropped by a third.”
t2.name: Elena Karpova

faq.title: Questions we get before the start

q1.q: How much does a website cost?
q1.a: A one-pager from €400, a turnkey landing page from €800, a multi-page website from €1500. The exact quote comes after a short brief, is fixed before we start and doesn’t change midway.

q2.a: A one-pager — 5–7 days, a landing page — 7–14, a multi-page site — 14–21. The launch date is fixed upfront. If it shifts, we tell you first.

q3.q: What do you build websites with?
q3.a: Custom code without builders — when speed and uniqueness matter, or Tilda / Webflow — when you want to edit things yourself later. We recommend the right fit on the first call.

q4.q: What do you need from me?
q4.a: 20 minutes for the brief, materials about your product (photos, prices, reviews — whatever you have) and feedback at two checkpoints: after the prototype and after the design. The rest is on us.

q5.a: For 30 days we fix anything that breaks or misbehaves for free. After that — support at a fixed price, no subscriptions. Domain and hosting are registered to you — the website is fully yours.

c.title: Tell us about your task — we’ll propose a solution in 24 hours
c.lead: Describe the website you need. The next day we come back with a short structure, timeline and price. No 90-minute calls.

contact.label: Telegram or phone
contact.err: We need a way to reach you

task.label: Describe the task
task.ph: E.g.: I need a landing page for a nail studio — booking via Telegram, and I want to collect leads from Instagram ads
task.err: Tell us briefly what you need

form.note: By submitting the form, you agree to data processing
form.success: ✓ Got it. We’ll reply within 24 hours via Telegram.
form.error: Couldn't send your request. Please try again or message us on Telegram — @infobackground.

footer.about: A studio for websites and landing pages. We help founders and teams get leads from the internet — fast, high-quality and without astronomical budgets.
